overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a walk through an urban construction zone with palm trees, passing pedestrians and vehicles, then ascending an escalator into a covered pedestrian bridge. The scene features a distinctive yellow-and-black industrial tower and a massive stadium structure in the background under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to active construction site

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a metal construction fence, passing pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: heavyset pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk
futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall silver metal fence with vertical bars separating sidewalk from construction site
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
massive futuristic stadium structure with curved architecture dominating the skyline
metal scaffolding and rebar structures within the construction site
tall cylindrical tower with yellow and black hazard stripes and number 04 visible

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a concrete sidewalk next to an active construction site enclosed by a metal fence. Palm trees line the street to the left while a massive futuristic stadium looms in the distance. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road. The yellow-and-black industrial tower becomes visible as the camera advances.

events.description: moving from sidewalk onto the street and construction area, crossing the red-painted curb
turning right toward the escalator entrance while navigating around construction barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through the construction zone and approaching the escalator entrance, navigating around barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers lining the construction edge
derelict silver sedan parked near the construction site
concrete and metal escalator entrance with covered roof structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sidewalk onto the street, navigating through a construction zone marked by red-and-white barriers. An abandoned car sits near the path as the camera turns toward a concrete escalator structure. The yellow-black tower and megastructure stadium grow larger in the frame as the camera approaches the escalator entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered escalator ascent between street and pedestrian bridge

events.description: entering the covered escalator structure from the open street, transitioning to enclosed space

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator upward while looking at the city views through the side openings

entered.detail: linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the escalator ceiling
multi-lane highway visible through the open sides of the escalator structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters and ascends a covered escalator structure, transitioning from bright outdoor light to a shaded, semi-enclosed space. Overhead linear lights illuminate the concrete stairs while views of the highway and city become visible through the open sides. The industrial tower shifts to the left as the camera rises.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with city overlook

events.description: transitioning from mixed natural light to fully artificial lighting as reaching the top of escalator

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the escalator and entering the covered pedestrian bridge, looking out at the cityscape

entered.detail: enclosed concrete pedestrian walkway with glass or open sides overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the top of the escalator and enters a fully enclosed pedestrian bridge with artificial lighting. The space features concrete construction with views overlooking the highway and city below. The megastructure stadium is no longer visible as the camera moves into the interior corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban construction zone into the shaded interior of an elevated pedestrian bridge. It begins with a walk along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing pedestrians and vehicles while a massive futuristic stadium and a yellow-and-black industrial tower loom in the distance. As the camera moves off the sidewalk and navigates through red-and-white construction barriers past an abandoned car, the industrial tower and stadium grow larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera enters and ascends a covered escalator, transitioning from the brilliant outdoor sunlight into a shaded space where linear overhead lights illuminate the climb. Finally, the camera reaches the top and enters a fully enclosed concrete corridor with artificial lighting, leaving the stadium behind to overlook the highway and city below.
